title: Module skills for workorders and waiting list
goal: Register the first module-owned skills for opening workorders and waiting-list entries in the right drawer.
requirements: Skill descriptions must include realistic trigger phrases.
Skill body must include when to use, when not to use, tool sequence, ambiguity handling and expected short success response.
Skill body must instruct the agent not to invent object ids or bypass access checks.
Required tools must include ui.open_right_panel and any module get/search tools used by the skill.
acceptance: Both module skills appear in the catalog.
Both module skill bodies load successfully.
Module tests prove registration happens without importing from agent runtime.
Skill bodies do not contain raw secrets, deployment details or user data.
